assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md, the post-triage summary comment ADF JSON contains an explicit mention node at lines 406-410: {"type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id", "text": "@psirt-analyst"}}. This is a properly formed ADF mention node with the correct reporter account ID.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md lines 452-458, the output explicitly states: 'This @mention is mandatory and requires no ProdSec configuration -- it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue. The reporter is always available on the Jira issue data extracted in Step 1.' The reporter was extracted in data-extraction.md line 21 as 'psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)' from the Jira issue's reporter field, confirming it is sourced from the issue itself, not from ProdSec config.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the Affects Versions correction comment ADF JSON contains an explicit mention node at lines 84-89: {"type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@prodsec-team"}}. This is a properly formed ADF mention node with the correct ProdSec account ID.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the ADF JSON structure shows: (1) the ProdSec mention paragraph at lines 78-91 containing the mention node with 'cc @prodsec-team', followed by (2) the horizontal rule at line 93 ({"type": "rule"}), followed by (3) the Comment Footnote paragraph at lines 96-121 ('This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/triage-security v0.11.0.'). The mention clearly precedes the footnote. Line 128 also explicitly confirms: 'The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote (horizontal rule + footer).'

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md lines 126-127: 'The ProdSec @mention uses an ADF mention node with account ID 557058:prodsec-mock-account-id (extracted from the Security Configuration's "ProdSec Jira account ID" field in Step 0)'. The ADF JSON at lines 84-89 confirms the account ID 557058:prodsec-mock-account-id is present in the mention node. In remediation.md lines 460-466, the output further confirms the ProdSec account ID was extracted from Security Configuration and is conditional on that configuration being present.
